headquarters: New York, New York, United States
name: International Flavors & Fragrances Inc.
summary: International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. is a global leader in the creation of flavors and fragrances. The company operates across multiple segments, including Taste, Scent, Health & Biosciences, and Pharma Solutions. IFF's products are used in a wide range of consumer goods, from food and beverages to personal care items and pharmaceuticals.
